name: Brickle Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well; gradually add both sugars and beat until thick and creamy.
2. Add the butter and extracts to the egg mixture and continue beating.
3. Combine the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, and salt) in a separate bowl.
4. Stir the flour mixture into the butter mixture until moist.
5. Fold in 2/3 of the Brickel bits and 1/2 cup nuts, if desired.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch by 13-inch pan.
7. Bake for 30 minutes.
8. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with the remaining Brickel bits.
9. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
